title: Add debounce utility in timing-helpers.ts
description: Created debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(fn: T, delayMs: number): T in src/utils/timing-helpers.ts with 9 comprehensive tests covering: delayed execution, single execution on rapid calls, last-argument capture, multiple arguments, re-execution after delay, this context preservation, zero delay, object method context, and timeout cancellation on rapid calls.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - Similar debounce implementation with comprehensive test patterns using vitest fake timers
src/utils/throttle.ts - Timing utility with co-located test file
src/utils/sleep.ts - Simple timing utility following same pattern
